name: swipe-action-row
title: Swipe Action Row
description: A mobile-first swipe action row that also works with pointer and keyboard: left/right actions with threshold + snap, opt-in full-swipe, only-one-open groups, a visible overflow menu and focus-revealed action buttons, destructive-action safeguards (confirmation / undo, full-swipe off by default), and reduced-motion fallbacks. Never touch-only.
